metadata.title: Global Agentic OS Dashboard
metadata.sourcePolicy: Local folder mode. Refreshed by ./agentic-os from PROJECT-PATHS.md, local git, task memory/todo/session files, and existing dashboard status. No external dashboards queried.

ResumeBuilder Web: defer rollout unless Resumely smoke exposes backend blockers.

projects.name: RunSmart iOS
projects.role: Primary premium mobile running coach product.
projects.status: Build 6 was rejected by Apple (Guideline 2.1a — iPad Privacy onboarding button unreachable). Build 8 resubmitted 2026-06-03: onboarding scroll fix + full version-2 1.0.1 UX redesign (A1-A6, B2-B4) + VoiceCoach. Version-2 merged to main. Build 9 bumped on main. GTM plan at .agent-os/distribution/gtm-plan.md.
projects.distributionStatus: Build 8 in Apple review (submitted 2026-06-03); launch distribution waits for review outcome
projects.activeStory: Monitor Apple review for RunSmart 1.0.1 build 9
projects.lastCompletedStory: RunSmart 1.0.1 build 9 submitted to App Store review (2026-06-05)
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Monitor App Store Connect; if Apple responds, handle only the review outcome before starting new release scope
projects.lastValidation: Founder confirmed App Store Connect submission of RunSmart 1.0.1 build 9 on 2026-06-05. Local release archive validation and git diff checks passed before the founder-controlled upload; Apple review result is pending
projects.validationState: v1.0 release artifacts frozen; Apple review outcome pending.
risks: Apple rejects build 8 for a new reason
Voice coach untested on physical device; VOICE_COACH_ENABLED still false in prod
Garmin webhook subscription health not yet audited

analyticsStatus.note: Activation events are wired; live funnel values still need production/TestFlight usage.

nextActions: Monitor Apple review of build 8 (submitted 2026-06-03); check App Store Connect for outcome.
If approved: merge version-2 artifacts, publish launch post, activate GTM plan (.agent-os/distribution/gtm-plan.md).
If rejected: triage Apple feedback, implement minimal fix, resubmit as build 9.
When live: flip VOICE_COACH_ENABLED=true in Vercel and audit Garmin webhook.

projects.name: Resumely iOS
projects.role: Native iOS app for Resumely resume optimization product.
projects.status: Pre-submission. Latest: pre-archive production audit done 2026-06-03 (bare print() calls wrapped). Phase 2 submit package complete. PostHog WP-1 key fix done (Run Script + PlistBuddy). Strong optimization mode, ATS uplift, manual section edit, and Me package hub all shipped. ASC upload path resolved: manual Xcode Organizer (no Fastlane, no .p8). Device smoke blocked on founder unlocking iPhone 13.

projects.lastCompletedStory: Resumely 1.0 build 1 submitted to App Store review (2026-06-05)

projects.lastValidation: Founder confirmed App Store Connect submission of Resumely 1.0 build 1 on 2026-06-05. The submitted screenshot set had already passed count, dimension, uniqueness, opacity, and targeted visual checks; Apple review result is pending
projects.validationState: Build, tests, analytics, UX, and export fixes passed. Real-device live-account smoke not done.
blockers: `/api/v1/resumes` still returns production Next.js 404 HTML, so Resume Library remains disabled
risks: WKWebView PDF/export fragility on real device
Backend Resume Library not yet live
Swift 6 concurrency strictness
No Hebrew/RTL support

analyticsStatus.note: PostHog integrated before first submission via AnalyticsService with PII guard and event de-dup. Verify live events during authenticated smoke.

nextActions: Founder: unlock iPhone 13 → install: xcrun devicectl device install app --device 4A1D6EF2-8945-55B8-931A-46980B2A27E2 '/var/tmp/resumebuilder-device-derived/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/ResumeBuilder IOS APP.app'
Run smoke: authenticate → optimize → design → expert → export. Screenshot each step.
Screenshot PostHog Live Events showing app_launched, optimization_completed, export_success.
Archive: Xcode Product → Archive → Window → Organizer → Distribute App → App Store Connect → Upload.

projects.name: RunSmart Web
projects.role: Main AI running coach product and source of product logic.
projects.status: Support/backend repo for RunSmart. Commit f677ad7 added the feature-flagged /api/coach/voice-cue endpoint for Sprint 11 voice work. The local checkout is dirty and needs triage before more implementation.
projects.activeStory: B1 voice-cue endpoint exists; inspect dirty state before continuing
projects.lastCompletedStory: feat(B1): /api/coach/voice-cue - TTS coaching cue endpoint with VOICE_COACH_ENABLED flag
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Triage dirty/untracked files and read B1 validation before iOS depends on it.
projects.lastValidation: No latest B1 validation was rerun during this status refresh.
projects.validationState: Needs dirty-tree triage and B1 evidence pull before execution.
blockers: Dirty local tree with many modified/untracked files, including duplicate ` 2` files.
risks: AI coaching correctness and user trust
Training plan logic regressions
Garmin/Apple readiness and sync assumptions
Auth, payments, subscriptions, and monetization
nextActions: Triage modified/untracked files before more web work.
Read B1 endpoint tests/evidence before wiring iOS voice cue service.
Keep web work limited to Sprint 11 backend support unless App Review requires a hotfix.

projects.name: ResumeBuilder AI (Web)
projects.role: High-quality resume generation, templates, export, confidence, and conversion.
projects.status: Backend/reference project for Resumely. PDF parse/render-preview fix exists on fix/pdf-parse-xref-error, but rollout shadow enablement remains unchecked and the branch is dirty.
projects.lastCompletedStory: fix(pdf-parse): fix xref error in PDF parse and render-preview pipeline
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Defer unless Resumely smoke exposes backend blockers; otherwise complete rollout shadow enablement.
projects.lastValidation: No contracts or rollout checks rerun during this status refresh.
projects.validationState: Needs branch cleanup and rollout validation before production activation.
risks: Low-quality AI output
Broken PDF/export formatting
Templates that look good but parse poorly
Hebrew/English direction bugs
nextActions: Leave parked unless Resumely smoke exposes backend parse/render issues.
Complete rollout shadow enablement and telemetry monitoring before production activation.
Keep the 90-day GTM plan deferred until App Store submission creates a real mobile CTA.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.role: Cross-project coordination for tasks, context, specs, QA, workflows, and agents.
projects.status: Future orchestration concept. Keep proving the manual workflow through Agentic OS dashboards before automating.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Keep manual workflow lightweight; automate only after repeated patterns are proven.
projects.lastValidation: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
projects.validationState: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
blockers: Manual orchestration workflow not yet proven enough to automate.
risks: Replacing local project truth with stale global summaries
Loading too much context
Over-centralizing secrets, docs, or decisions
Creating fake certainty across repos
nextActions: Use the Global Agentic OS dashboard as a manual coordination layer.
Keep local project repos as source of truth.
Record repeatable workflows before building Atlas automation.

top3: Resumely iOS: founder device smoke on iPhone 13, then Xcode Organizer archive + ASC upload.

openDecisions: RunSmart iOS: if build 8 rejected again, decide minimal fix scope vs. expanding v2 feature set before resubmit.

executiveBoard.financialSnapshot: Needs Data - no revenue/cost instrumentation wired.
executiveBoard.note: EXD-004 Decided: Resumely PostHog integrated before first submission. EXD-006 Decided: Resumely ASC upload is manual Xcode Organizer path (no Fastlane, no .p8). GTM plan v0.1 exists for RunSmart iOS at .agent-os/distribution/gtm-plan.md.

decisionBoard.decision: RunSmart iOS: build 8 rejection response scope
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: If Apple rejects build 8 again, the response needs a clear scope boundary — minimal fix vs. expanding v2 features risks scope creep and delays submission.
decisionBoard.options: Minimal targeted fix only / fix + add 1-2 v2 features / full v2 rebuild
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Minimal fix targeting only the rejection reason. Ship as build 9. Save v2 feature scope for after approval.
decisionBoard.urgency: Conditional — only if build 8 is rejected

decisionBoard.decision: RunSmart iOS: when to flip VOICE_COACH_ENABLED in Vercel
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Voice coach is shipped in build 8 but the Vercel flag is still false. Users cannot use it until flipped.
decisionBoard.options: Flip immediately after approval / wait for physical-device QA first / keep off for v1 launch
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Flip after approval + physical-device voice QA passes. Do not flip before the app is live.

decisionBoard.decision: Resumely iOS: App Store upload path
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Submission is blocked until archive is uploaded to ASC.
decisionBoard.options: Manual Xcode Organizer (confirmed available) / set up Fastlane with .p8 key
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Manual Xcode Organizer path. EXD-006 resolved: no Fastlane, no .p8 key found. Xcode Organizer is the path.
decisionBoard.urgency: High — next action after device smoke

decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Backend parse/render fixes matter if Resumely smoke exposes backend issues, but should not distract from submission otherwise.
decisionBoard.options: Finish rollout now / defer until after Resumely submit
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Defer unless Resumely smoke finds backend blockers.

runCenter.safeMode: No App Store, billing, production, email, or external service action is triggered.
runCenter.synthesisNote: One process: `./agentic-os morning` refreshes evidence, surfaces every saved plan, rebuilds the brief from repo truth, updates the HTML, verifies, and serves localhost. No separate synthesis step.

agentQueue.task: Handle an App Store review outcome without reopening completed submission work.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use only after Apple approves, rejects, or requests information for either submitted app.
agentQueue.starter: Act as Release Manager. Read dashboard/status.json and the target iOS repo tasks/progress.md plus tasks/session-log.md. If there is no new Apple review outcome, stop and report that monitoring is the only action. If Apple responded, create one focused response packet from the exact review message. Do not resubmit or change release scope without explicit approval.

agentQueue.task: Resolve the next portfolio decision and keep focus tight.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use when there are competing next moves across RunSmart, Resumely, distribution, and backend support.
agentQueue.starter: Act as CEO OS. Read dashboard/status.json and executive-os/EXECUTIVE-DASHBOARD.md. Pick the one highest-leverage decision, recommend an option, state cost of delay, and list the single next action.

agentQueue.task: Turn the current Action Board into one reviewable work packet.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use when you want the next agent task delegated without losing source context.
agentQueue.starter: Act as Director. Read dashboard/status.json, especially priorityBoard, projectHealth, and agentQueue. Create one decision-complete task packet for the recommended agent. Include goal, files to read, acceptance criteria, checks, and what not to touch.

agentQueue.task: Verify dashboard or product readiness with evidence.
agentQueue.whenToUse: Use before calling a status, UI, or release task done.
agentQueue.starter: Act as QA. Read GLOBAL-QA-RULES.md and dashboard/status.json. Build a focused QA checklist for the target change, run the available checks, and report pass/fail with evidence and missing validation.

Deliver one progress-making work packet only: objective, files to inspect, exact implementation or QA steps, acceptance criteria, checks to run, and what must not be touched. Do not deploy, submit, email, bill, migrate, or change production services without explicit approval.

commands.name: ./agentic-os morning
commands.purpose: The one command. Refreshes from every repo, surfaces all OS layers and plans, rebuilds the brief, updates the dashboard, verifies, and opens it on localhost.

commands.name: ./agentic-os refresh
commands.purpose: Rebuilds the dashboard data from local repos. No server.

commands.name: ./agentic-os serve
commands.purpose: Opens the current dashboard on localhost. No refresh.

commands.name: ./agentic-os verify
commands.purpose: Checks the dashboard data, links, and tests all line up.

executiveLoop.brainstorm:
Living scratchpad for ideas and the next moves, before they become decisions or work packets.
This is the front of the operating loop:
**Morning (status) → Executive review (remarks) → Decisions (EXECUTIVE-DECISIONS.md) → Work packets (work-packets/) → here (brainstorm next).**
Keep it loose. Promote anything solid into a decision (EXECUTIVE-DECISIONS.md) or a work packet (work-packets/). Nothing here is committed work until it moves to one of those.
- _Add ideas as bullets. Date them. Move the good ones down to "Shaping" when they firm up._
- _Ideas being turned into an EXD decision or a WP work packet. Note which._
- _Not now, but do not lose._
---
